evals.prompt: Bootstrap GitLab CI for apps/payments/ monorepo with backend and frontend on develop/homolog/main.
evals.expected_output: Agent copies template to .gitlab-ci.yml, adapts E2E path and PHP image, documents ci-cd-notes.md.

evals.prompt: Our E2E lives in tests-e2e/ not testes-cypress — fix the pipeline template.
evals.expected_output: Agent updates changes paths and job working directories in generated YAML.

evals.prompt: Disable remote E2E gate for now but keep backend and frontend deploy.
evals.expected_output: Agent adjusts rules/needs per skill guidance, documents RUN_REMOTE_E2E=false.
